sections.sectionTitle: Ammon mite leh Syria mite a Kizawhna

verses.text: Hih thu khit tawlkhat ciangin Ammon mite' kumpipa Nahash si a, a tapa in ama tangin uk hi

Tua ciangin David in, “Ama pa kei tungah thuman takin hong gamta ahih manin Nahash' tapa Hanun' tungah thuman takin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in a pa' huhau-in amah a hehnem dingin kamtaite a sawl hi. Tua ciangin David' nasemte amah a hehnem dingin Ammon mite' gam Hanun' kiangah hong pai uh hi

Ahih hangin Ammon mite' uliante in Hanun' kiangah, “David in nang kiangah hehnemte hong sawlna hangin na pa a pahtawi hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi hiam? Gamsung a pheklek ding leh a lumlet ding leh gamsung a ensim dingin ama nasemte na kiangah hong pai hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Hanun in David' nasemte manin a khamul uh metsak a, a kawng ciang uhah a puante uh atkhiatsakna tawh amaute daisakin a sawlkhia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kihem uh hi

Hih mite tawh kisai thu David kiangah a kigen ciangin amaute a dawntuah dingin mi a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite nakpi takin maizum uh a, ciah ngamlo uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Na khamul uh a khan'kik mateng Jerikho-ah om un la, tua ciangin hong ciah un,” a ci hi

Ammon mite in David' muhdahin amau mah a kibawl tawmna uh a muh uh ciangin Hanun leh Ammon mite in Mesopotamia, Arammaakah, leh Zobah panin leeng galkapte leh sakol galkapte cialna dingin ngun talen tul khat a puak uh hi

Amaute in leeng galkap tul sawmthum leh tul nih leh Maakah gam kumpipa a galkap tawh cial uh a, amaute hong pai-in Medeba khua kiangah phual a sat uh hi. Tua ciangin a khuapite uh panin Ammon mite kikhawmin galsim dingin hong kuan uh hi
David in tua thu a zak ciangin Joab leh mi thahat galkap khempeuh a sawl hi
Tua ciangin Ammon mite hong kuankhia-in khuapi lutna-ah galdo dingin hong pang uh a, a hong kuan kumpite in gamlakah pan'mun a la uh hi
Gal in a nung leh a mai panin a pan'na Joab in a theih ciangin Israel mi a kitengkhia mi pawlkhat teel a, Syria mite a do dingin pangsak hi
A omlai a mite amah in a sanggampa Abishai' ukin koih a, Ammon mite a do dingin amaute kipangsak hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Syria mite ka lelhtuak leh nangmah in kei nong huh ding a, ahih hangin Ammon mite nang na lelhtuak leh keimah in nang kong huh ding hi
Hang in; i mite-a' ding leh i Pasian' khuapite-a' dingin pasal tat ni; Topa in ama hoihsak bangin hong hih ta hen,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joab leh amah tawh a om mite in a do dingin Syria mite kiang hong naih uh hi. Tua ciangin ama mai-ah Syria mite tai uh hi
Syria mite a taina Ammon mite in a muh uh ciangin tua bangmahin amaute zong Joab' sanggampa Abishai' mai-ah tai uh a, khuapi sungah lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah Joab hong ciahkik hi
Ahih hangin Syria mite in Israel-te a lelhlam uh a kitheih uh ciangin, amaute in kamtaite sawlin Eufratis gal khata om Syria galkapte sam uh a, Hadadezer' galkapte a ukpa Shofak a makai-in koih uh hi

David kiangah hih thu a kigen ciangin, amah in Israel khempeuh khawmin Jordan galkah a, amaute kiangah pai-in amaute a do dingin galkapte khawm hi. David in Syria mite a do dingin gal pangsak a, Syria mite tawh kido uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel-te' mai-ah Syria mite tai uh hi. Tua ciangin David in Syria mite' leeng hawl galkap mihing tul sagih, leh khe galkap tul sawmli that a, amau' galkap a ukpa Shofak zong a that hi
Tua khit ciangin Hadadezer' nasemte in Israel-te a lelhlam uh a kitheih uh ciangin amaute in David tawh kilemna bawl uh a, ama khutnuai mi a suak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Syria mite in Ammon mite huh nuam nawnlo uh hi.
